title: Front Office Manager - EazyDiner - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - EazyDiner - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at EazyDiner are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About EazyDiner:
EazyDiner is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner!
